title: Implement battle remote functions
description: Implement getBattles, getBattle, createBattle, updateBattle, deleteBattle in battle.remote.ts with proper auth checks and 8-char nanoid

title: Update battle schema with new status enum and defaults
description: Add draft/cancelled to status enum, add notNull to name, add defaults for status/visibility/maxPlayers, add validation refinements via drizzle-valibot

title: Build battle edit form and page
description: Implement /b/[id]/edit with form using Field components, updateBattle and deleteBattle remote functions. Wrap query in <svelte:boundary> with pending/failed snippets.

title: Phase 1: Battle CRUD
description: Implement core CRUD operations for battles. Users can create, view, edit, and cancel battles. See docs/plans/2025-12-28-battle-crud-design.md for full design.

title: Build battle create form and page
description: Implement /b/new with form using Field components, createBattle remote function

title: Build home page with battles list
description: Implement /home with getBattles, Empty state, battle cards linking to detail pages. Wrap query in <svelte:boundary> with pending/failed snippets.

title: Build battle detail page
description: Implement /b/[id] with Card info display, edit button for owner. Wrap query in <svelte:boundary> with pending/failed snippets.
